name: Yole Edge Cases and Stress Test Bank
description: Edge case and stress tests: tabs, large files, rapid cycles, memory pressure, network loss, accessibility, and Android specifics

test_cases.name: Open 20 tabs simultaneously

steps.name: Open first 10 files
steps.action: Open 10 different text files in separate tabs
steps.expected: All 10 tabs visible in tab bar (may scroll)

steps.name: Open next 10 files
steps.action: Open 10 more files
steps.expected: 20 tabs total; tab bar scrollable or overflow menu present

steps.name: Switch between tabs
steps.action: Click/tap tabs 1, 10, 20 in sequence
steps.expected: Each tab content loads within 500ms, no OOM crash

steps.name: Check memory
steps.action: Monitor memory usage
steps.expected: App memory stays within reasonable bounds (no OOM kill)

test_cases.expected_result: 20 open tabs navigable without crash or unacceptable memory growth

test_cases.name: Close all tabs and verify clean state

steps.name: Open 10 tabs
steps.action: Open 10 files

steps.name: Close all tabs one by one
steps.action: Close each tab in sequence
steps.expected: Each close responds quickly; tab count decrements

steps.name: Verify empty state
steps.action: Check app after last tab closed
steps.expected: Empty state shown (welcome screen or file browser)

test_cases.expected_result: All tabs closeable; empty state displayed cleanly

test_cases.name: Rapid format switching between 17 formats

steps.name: Open a text file
steps.action: Open a .txt file in editor

steps.name: Rapidly switch formats
steps.action: Change format to Markdown, then Org, then CSV, then LaTeX, cycling through all 17 formats within 30s
steps.expected: Each format switch applies correct syntax highlighting

steps.name: Verify no freeze
steps.action: Check UI responsiveness throughout
steps.expected: App remains responsive; no ANR or freeze

test_cases.expected_result: Rapid format switching does not freeze or crash the app

test_cases.name: Open 5MB text file

steps.name: Open a 5MB plain text file
steps.action: Load a 5MB .txt file from local storage
steps.expected: File begins loading; progress indicator shown

steps.name: Wait for load completion
steps.action: Wait up to 10 seconds
steps.expected: File opens in editor within 10 seconds

steps.name: Scroll to end
steps.action: Jump to end of document
steps.expected: End of file reached; final lines visible

steps.name: Type at end
steps.action: Insert a character at end

test_cases.expected_result: 5MB file loads and remains editable within time limits

test_cases.name: Open file with 100K lines

steps.name: Open 100K-line file
steps.action: Load a text file containing exactly 100,000 lines

steps.name: Jump to line 50000
steps.action: Use Go To Line to jump to line 50000
steps.expected: Jumps to correct line within 1 second

steps.name: Edit at line 50000
steps.action: Insert text at line 50000

steps.name: Undo the edit
steps.action: Press Ctrl+Z or Undo

test_cases.expected_result: 100K-line file navigable and editable without unacceptable lag

test_cases.name: Rapid save/load cycles (50 iterations)

steps.name: Open a small text file
steps.action: Open a 1KB .md file

steps.name: Perform 50 save/edit cycles
steps.action: For each of 50 iterations: type one character, save, wait 100ms

steps.name: Verify final content
steps.action: Check file content after 50 cycles
steps.expected: All 50 characters present; no data corruption

test_cases.expected_result: 50 rapid save cycles complete without corruption or crash

test_cases.name: Open many documents under memory pressure

steps.name: Open 15 medium-sized files
steps.action: Open 15 files each around 100KB

steps.name: Monitor memory
steps.action: Check memory consumption
steps.expected: Memory does not exceed 512MB heap (or platform limit)

steps.name: Switch rapidly between all tabs
steps.action: Cycle through all 15 tabs
steps.expected: Each tab renders without reloading from disk if recently viewed

steps.name: Close half the tabs
steps.action: Close 7 tabs

test_cases.expected_result: Memory stays bounded under load; no OOM kill

test_cases.name: Network interruption during cloud file list

steps.name: Begin listing a cloud directory
steps.action: Open a large cloud directory (50+ files)

steps.name: Cut network mid-listing
steps.action: Disable network while listing is in progress

steps.name: Restore network
steps.action: Re-enable network
steps.expected: Refresh button or auto-retry restores the listing

test_cases.expected_result: Network interruption during listing shows error and recovers

test_cases.name: Repeated network flapping does not corrupt state

steps.name: Enable/disable network 10 times rapidly
steps.action: Toggle airplane mode on and off 10 times within 20 seconds

steps.name: Verify app stability
steps.action: Check app is not crashed or frozen
steps.expected: App responsive; no ANR; offline/online status correct

steps.name: Perform a cloud operation
steps.action: List files from cloud after flapping stops

test_cases.expected_result: Network flapping does not crash or corrupt app state

test_cases.name: Background app during save completes save

steps.name: Open file and start editing
steps.action: Open a cloud-backed file, make significant changes

steps.name: Trigger save then immediately background
steps.action: Tap Save, then immediately press Home button

steps.name: Return to app
steps.action: Switch back to Yole
steps.expected: Save completed; no unsaved indicator; content intact

test_cases.expected_result: Save completes correctly when app is backgrounded mid-save

test_cases.name: App killed in background preserves auto-saved content

steps.name: Open file, edit, wait for auto-save
steps.action: Make changes and allow auto-save to trigger

steps.name: Background and let system kill app
steps.action: Open many apps to trigger low memory kill of Yole

steps.name: Relaunch Yole
steps.action: Tap Yole icon

test_cases.expected_result: Auto-saved content restored after OS-initiated process kill

test_cases.name: Save fails gracefully when storage is full

steps.name: Fill device storage to near-full
steps.action: Reduce available storage to under 1MB

steps.name: Attempt to save a large file
steps.action: Try to save a 500KB file
steps.expected: Save fails with clear error: 'Not enough storage space'

steps.name: Verify original file intact
steps.action: Check that previous version of file not corrupted
steps.expected: Original file unchanged; no partial write

test_cases.expected_result: Storage full error shown clearly; no data corruption

test_cases.name: Screen reader navigates main screens

steps.name: Enable TalkBack (Android) or screen reader
steps.action: Enable accessibility screen reader in OS settings

steps.name: Navigate to Files tab
steps.action: Swipe to Files tab and double-tap to activate

steps.name: Navigate file list
steps.action: Swipe through file list items
steps.expected: Each file name announced by screen reader

steps.name: Open a file
steps.action: Double-tap a file
steps.expected: File opens; screen reader announces editor opened

test_cases.expected_result: Screen reader can navigate main app flows end-to-end

test_cases.name: Large text mode does not break layouts

steps.name: Set system font size to largest
steps.action: Set OS font size to 200% or maximum accessibility size

steps.name: Launch Yole
steps.action: Open Yole application

steps.name: Check main screens
steps.action: Navigate through Files, Todo, QuickNote, Settings
steps.expected: All text readable; no text clipped or overflowing beyond screen

steps.name: Open editor
steps.action: Open a file in editor with large font
steps.expected: Editor text readable; buttons and tabs not obscured

test_cases.expected_result: 200% font size does not break any screen layout

test_cases.name: High contrast mode renders correctly

steps.name: Enable high contrast or forced dark mode
steps.action: Enable OS high contrast accessibility setting

steps.name: Check app contrast ratios
steps.action: Navigate through main screens and editor
steps.expected: All text meets WCAG AA contrast ratio (4.5:1 minimum)

steps.name: Check interactive elements
steps.action: Inspect buttons, tabs, and input fields

test_cases.expected_result: High contrast mode maintains readable and distinguishable UI

test_cases.name: Keyboard-only navigation covers all actions (Desktop)

steps.name: Disable mouse/trackpad
steps.action: Use keyboard only (Tab, Enter, arrow keys)
steps.expected: Focus indicator visible on first interactive element

steps.name: Tab through main navigation
steps.action: Press Tab to cycle through navigation items
steps.expected: Focus moves to each nav item in logical order

steps.name: Open a file via keyboard
steps.action: Navigate to a file and press Enter to open

steps.name: Edit and save via keyboard
steps.action: Type content, press Ctrl+S

test_cases.expected_result: All primary app functions reachable via keyboard alone

test_cases.name: Rotation during active editing preserves all state

steps.name: Open file and type content
steps.action: Open a .md file, type 'rotation test content', scroll to line 50

steps.name: Rotate to landscape mid-typing
steps.action: Rotate device while typing
steps.expected: Rotation completes; typed text present; cursor near last position

steps.name: Continue typing
steps.action: Type more text in landscape

steps.name: Rotate back
steps.action: Rotate back to portrait
steps.expected: All content intact; scroll position reasonable

test_cases.expected_result: Active editing state fully preserved across rotation

test_cases.name: Rotation during cloud operation completes cleanly

steps.name: Start a cloud file upload
steps.action: Begin uploading a file to WebDAV

steps.name: Rotate device mid-upload
steps.action: Rotate while upload is at ~30%
steps.expected: Activity recreates; upload continues in background

steps.name: Verify upload completes
steps.action: playwright: waitFor text=upload to finish post-rotation
steps.expected: Upload completes; file appears in cloud listing
steps._original_action: Wait for upload to finish post-rotation

test_cases.expected_result: Rotation during upload does not cancel or corrupt the operation

test_cases.name: Yole usable in split-screen mode

steps.name: Enter split-screen with Yole
steps.action: Put Yole in split-screen alongside Files app

steps.name: Navigate and open a file
steps.action: Open a file from file browser in split-screen
steps.expected: Editor opens in constrained space; content readable

steps.name: Type in editor
steps.action: Enter text in the narrow editor
steps.expected: Typing works; keyboard does not cover editor fully

test_cases.expected_result: Yole is functional and usable in Android split-screen mode

test_cases.name: Drag file from Files app into Yole (multi-window)

steps.name: Open Yole and Files in split-screen
steps.action: Launch both apps in split-screen

steps.name: Drag a text file from Files into Yole
steps.action: Long-press file in Files app and drag to Yole panel
steps.expected: Yole opens the dragged file or shows a drop target

test_cases.expected_result: File drag from Files app into Yole opens the file

test_cases.name: App launch time within threshold

steps.name: Cold launch the app
steps.action: Force-close Yole, then launch from home screen/dock

steps.name: Measure time to interactive
steps.action: Record time from tap to fully interactive main screen
steps.expected: Time to interactive under 3s on mid-range device

test_cases.expected_result: Cold start completes within 3 seconds on target hardware

test_cases.name: No memory leak after repeated open/close cycles

steps.name: Record baseline memory
steps.action: Note app memory after fresh launch

steps.name: Perform 30 open/close file cycles
steps.action: Open a file, read it, close it — repeat 30 times

steps.name: Check memory after cycles
steps.action: Record memory after 30 cycles
steps.expected: Memory within 20% of baseline (no significant leak)

test_cases.expected_result: Repeated open/close cycles do not cause detectable memory leak

test_cases.name: App recovers from unexpected background kill

steps.name: Open several files with edits
steps.action: Open 3 files, make edits in each, do not save manually

steps.name: Simulate process death
steps.action: Use 'adb shell am kill' or low memory trigger to kill Yole

steps.name: Relaunch Yole
steps.action: Tap Yole icon
steps.expected: App restores session state: same 3 tabs present

steps.name: Verify content
steps.action: Check each tab content
steps.expected: At minimum auto-saved content restored; no blank editors

test_cases.expected_result: Session restored after unexpected process death

test_cases.name: Simultaneous cloud sync and local edit

steps.name: Open a cloud-backed file
steps.action: Open a file stored on WebDAV

steps.name: Trigger background sync while editing
steps.action: Type rapidly while a background sync is in progress

steps.name: Verify final state
steps.action: After sync and typing complete, save and check content
steps.expected: No data loss or duplication; last-write-wins or merge applied

test_cases.expected_result: Concurrent sync and local edit resolves without data loss
